title: MD
biography: William Halsted was an American surgeon who established the first formal surgical residency program, pioneered radical mastectomy for breast cancer, and introduced the use of rubber surgical gloves.
aiSummary: William Halsted is a surgery specialist at Johns Hopkins Hospital. Based in Baltimore.

timeline.title: Established surgical residency system
timeline.description: Created the model for surgical training still used worldwide

timeline.title: Introduced rubber surgical gloves
timeline.description: Asked Goodyear to produce rubber gloves for operating room use

timeline.title: Radical mastectomy
timeline.description: Developed the Halsted radical mastectomy for breast cancer
